## Summary

What does this change and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes (offline)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change (shapes / invariants / behavior)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if user-facing
- [ ] Docs updated (README / module docstrings / ADR or design doc for a big
      decision)

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know — trade-offs, follow-ups, or things intentionally
left out.
